name: sop-generator
description: Your team does the same thing every week but it only lives in one person's head. Describe the process in plain English — messy is fine — and get back a clean, structured SOP with numbered steps, decision points, checklists, and role assignments. Ready to drop into Notion, Confluence, or Google Docs.
tagline: Turn tribal knowledge into documented processes

skills.name: create-sop
skills.description: Generate a structured SOP from a plain-English process description

outputDescription: A complete SOP document with numbered steps, decision points, role assignments, checklists, troubleshooting table, and revision history — ready for Notion or Confluence.
